title: President Trump Delivers his 2026 State of the Union Address
description: During the State of the Union, President Trump awarded U.S. Army Chief Warrant Officer Eric Slover the Congressional Medal of Honor for extraordinary acts
text: Gary and Evalea Beckstrom, parents of West Virginia National Guardsmen Sarah Beckstrom, were invited by President Trump to the gallery to be presented with a posthumous Purple Heart on behalf of their daughter who was tragically killed outside the White House defending our capital.
